title: poa annua subsp. supina
intro: Poa annua subsp. supina is a subspecies of the annual bluegrass plant, a type of grass that is commonly found in temperate regions. It is also known as blue poa or smooth poa, characterized by its fine leaves and delicate blue-green flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Poa annua subsp. supina include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared as a tea or infusion for herbal remedies.
